# Pickup options compared

ACME offers three ways to receive an order, chosen based on item size and convenience. Options include home-delivery (NT$80 standard shipping, free over NT$1,000), convenience-store-pickup (NT$60; parcels held 7 days after arriving at the store), and in-store-pickup (free; held 3 days from the ready-for-pickup-notification).

[Source: pickup_options.md#pickup-options-compared]

Curbside pickup is available at all three stores.
